description_long: This is a long, narrow banner with a rectangular display area at one end, featuring a visually striking green and white abstract pattern. The banner is supported by a thin, linear structure that extends horizontally, with several small, dark fixtures or fasteners visible along its length. The main display area is flat and appears to be made of a rigid material, likely designed to withstand outdoor conditions. The supporting structure is minimalistic, suggesting a lightweight yet sturdy construction, possibly metal. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for urban environments such as streets or public plazas. The banner's content is abstract, with no visible text or branding, focusing on visual impact.
description: A sleek, horizontally oriented banner with a green and white abstract pattern, supported by a thin linear frame and small fixtures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular display area with the abstract pattern and the supporting structure extending backward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, linear support structure and the minimal thickness of the banner display.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the display area and the alignment of the support structure, with fixtures visible along the length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the linear support and the attachment points, with the display area at the far end.
